name: reposcope-action
description: Security vulnerability scanner for GitHub Actions — PR review comments, CWE IDs, and a build-gating security score. By NxGen Tech Solutions.

scripts.build: tsc --outDir build && ncc build build/index.js -o dist --minify --license dist/licenses.txt && rm -rf build

author: NxGen Tech Solutions <support@reposcope.app>
